extraction.one_line_summary: PETERS Nans won from an 18-rider breakaway that splintered inside 25km, while LANDA Mikel attacked the GC group in final kilometer gaining 12 seconds on CARAPAZ Richard
tactical_patterns: BAKELANTS Jan attacked solo before final climb from 18-rider break, forcing early selections before companions could regroup and organize chase
LANDA Mikel attacked final kilometer when LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel went, exploiting lack of cohesion when teammate became threat to GC rivals
Breakaway riders attacked each other before 25km-to-go mark specifically to secure time bonus eligibility, accelerating fragmentation earlier than terrain demanded
LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel showed weakness when teammates set him up on final climb but he lacked legs, forcing ROGLIČ Primož to chase LANDA alone

rider_signals.PETERS Nans: positive: Large rider from French Alps made solo move knowing final gradual climb suited time trialing over pure climbers, perfectly timed effort
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Fourth overall, gained 12 seconds on podium rivals by attacking when LÓPEZ became distraction, hands-on-drops style extracting maximum watts
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: negative: White jersey holder visibly lacked legs when teammates set him up on final climb, lost 7 seconds and switched positions with LANDA
rider_signals.BAKELANTS Jan: positive: Attacked solo from 18-rider break before final climb building 1:03 gap, forcing premature responses from dangerous GC riders like FORMOLO
rider_signals.CONTI Valerio: neutral: Conserved energy in break by appearing to lose contact then regaining on descent, tactical hiding before late accelerations began
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: Attacked breakaway at 7.7km remaining, finished second for Mitchelton-Scott showing recovery strength on gradual gradients
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Had to follow teammate LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel when he became GC threat, conceded 12 seconds to LANDA in compromised tactical position
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Forced to chase LANDA alone when LÓPEZ went, lost time in situation where team coordination broke down among GC contenders
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Lost 20 seconds on final climb, struggled on gradual gradients suggesting cumulative fatigue rather than explosive weakness
